posts.title: 人工智能算法中的Hello-World：用LeNet模型实现手写数字识别
posts.text: Mnist数据集介绍数据集的内容：包含0-9的手写数字数据集的数量：60000个训练集/10000个测试集数据集的格式：28*28数据集通道数：灰度图（单通道通道） LeNet七层模型C1卷积层：6个卷积核，大小为5*5，激活函数ReLumodel.add(Conv2D(6, kernel_size = (5,5), activation = ‘relu’, input_shape = (28,28,1))) S2池化层：最大池化model.add(MaxPooling2D(pool_size = (2,2))) C3卷积层：16个卷积核，大小为5*5，激活函数ReLumodel.add(Conv2D(16, kernel_size = (5,5), activation = ‘relu’)) S4池化层：最大池化model.add(MaxPooling2D(pool_size = (2,2))) C5全连接层：参数扁平化，在LeNet5称之为卷积层，实际上这一层是一维向量，和全连接层一样model.add(Flatten())model.add(Dense(120, activation = ‘relu’)) F6全连接层：输出节点为84个model.add(Dense(84, activation = ‘relu’)) Output输出层：用softmax激活函数计算分类概率model.add(Dense(10, activation = ‘softmax’)) 模型训练数据加载(train_x,train_y),(test_x,test_y) = mnist.load_data() 输入数据为mnist数据集train_x = train_x.reshape(train_x.shape[0], 28, 28, 1) / 255test_x = test_x.reshape(test_x.shape[0], 28, 28, 1) / 255train_y = keras.utils.to_categorical(train_y, 10)test_y = keras.utils.to_categorical(test_y, 10) 设置损失函数和优化器配置model.compile(loss = keras.metrics.categorical_crossentropy, optimizer = keras.optimizers.Adam(), metrics = [‘accuracy’]) 传入训练数据进行训练model.fit(train_x, train_y, batch_size = 128, epochs = 5, verbose = 1, validation_data = (test_x,test_y)) 对结果进行评估score = model.evaluate(test_x, test_y) 训练结果及准确率
